<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox crafting
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|min_level=<%= it.minLevel %>
}}<section end="infobox" />

<section begin="costs" />
<%~ it.costsSection -%>
<section end="costs" />

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Crafting]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated crafting source pages]]
